title: Aliens Uncovered: Buried Cities & Lost Tribes
original_title: Aliens Uncovered: Buried Cities & Lost Tribes
overview: Hidden in the Grand Canyon, in the areas that are off limits to modern civilization, is a group of ancestors that have become lost over time. With the help of a Hopi Elder, we uncovered this lost group and discover an ancient connection.
